name: jdb-mcp
description: An MCP server that turns an LLM into a Java debugger via JDI - pre-declare the values you want before a breakpoint fires and get back a compact structured snapshot, no heap dumps. Requires JDK 17+.
author: ylw

scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='../jdb-mcp/target/jdb-mcp-1.0.0.jar';const dst='jars/jdb-mcp-1.0.0.jar';if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.error('Jar not found: '+src+'; run mvn package first');process.exit(1);}fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied jar to '+dst);"
